testcase.name: F2 VNC connection final acceptance
testcase.system-out:
[TEST] Initial screenshot saved [TEST] Connect button found [TEST] Console logs so far: [error] Failed to load resource: the server responded with a status of 404 (File not found) [TEST] Page errors: Unexpected token ')' connectVNC is not defined

testcase.failure: [chromium] › f2-vnc-acceptance.spec.ts:6:5 › F2 VNC connection final acceptance ────────────────── Error: expect(locator).toContainText(expected) failed Locator: locator('#vncStatusText') Expected substring: "已连接" Received string: "未连接" Timeout: 25000ms Call log: - Expect "toContainText" with timeout 25000ms - waiting for locator('#vncStatusText') 54 × locator resolved to 未连接 - unexpected value "未连接" 44 | // Step 5: Wait for "已连接" to appear in the status text 45 | const statusText = page.locator('#vncStatusText'); > 46 | await expect(statusText).toContainText('已连接', { timeout: 25000 }); | ^ 47 | 48 | // Step 6: Take connected screenshot 49 | await page.screenshot({ at /Users/danielli/.openclaw/workspace/projects/boss-recruitment-system/tests/f2-vnc-acceptance.spec.ts:46:28 attachment #1: screenshot (image/png) ────────────────────────────────────────────────────────── ../../../test-results/f2-vnc-acceptance-F2-VNC-connection-final-acceptance-chromium/test-failed-1.png ──────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────── attachment #2: video (video/webm) ────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────── ../../../test-results/f2-vnc-acceptance-F2-VNC-connection-final-acceptance-chromium/video.webm ──────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────── Error Context: ../../../test-results/f2-vnc-acceptance-F2-VNC-connection-final-acceptance-chromium/error-context.md Retry #1 ─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────── Error: expect(locator).toContainText(expected) failed Locator: locator('#vncStatusText') Expected substring: "已连接" Received string: "未连接" Timeout: 25000ms Call log: - Expect "toContainText" with timeout 25000ms - waiting for locator('#vncStatusText') 53 × locator resolved to 未连接 - unexpected value "未连接" 44 | // Step 5: Wait for "已连接" to appear in the status text 45 | const statusText = page.locator('#vncStatusText');
